markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Demo Semrush Enterprise platform features and discuss potential upgrade for growthx.ai team.](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Semrush Enterprise offers automated workflows that save significant time compared to manual processes in core Semrush](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [Key features include rapid website performance analysis, AI-powered keyword clustering, and content optimization tools](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)
  - [growthx.ai team sees value in speeding up processes, especially for newer team members and content analytics](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Integration with Google Analytics for conversion tracking is a particularly appealing feature](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)

## Topics

### Current Semrush Usage at growthx.ai

  - [Team heavily uses Semrush, especially for keyword gap analysis](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
  - [Semrush is part of onboarding documentation for new team members](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Primarily monitor blog content rather than entire website for most customers](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)

### Semrush Enterprise Features Demo

  - [What's Happened Report: Provides quick (5-minute) overview of website performance changes](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
      - [Identifies traffic changes, keyword winners/losers, and SERP feature changes](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
      - [Can focus on specific URL paths or subdomains (e.g., blog only)](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [Keyword Clustering:](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
      - [Uses AI to group semantically related keywords](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
      - [Aggregates search volumes for clustered keywords](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
  - [Content Analysis Tool:](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
      - [Compares content performance against top competitors](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
      - [Provides content score and recommendations for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
  - [Content Brief Generation:](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
      - [Creates detailed outlines and writing instructions](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
      - [Includes AI prompts for content generation (less relevant for growthx.ai's custom AI workflows)](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [Forecasting Tool:](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
      - [Projects potential traffic and revenue gains based on ranking improvements](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
      - [Useful for demonstrating SEO value to clients](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

### Google Analytics Integration

  - [Can incorporate conversion data, revenue, and other key metrics from GA](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Customizable dashboards to focus on specific KPIs (e.g., non-brand traffic, conversion events)](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
  - [Particularly valuable feature for growthx.ai team and their clients](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)

### growthx.ai's Specific Needs

  - [Ability to create custom dashboards for individual client needs](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
  - [Interest in conversion tracking and event data visualization](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)
  - [Need for efficient processes, especially for newer team members](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sydney to share demo information with Jason (CEO/decision-maker)](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
  - [growthx.ai team to evaluate potential time savings and value of Enterprise features](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting to be scheduled if Jason wants a personal demo](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [Amber and Kevin (Semrush) available for any additional information or data requests](https://fathom.video/share/2FpftBjAxrsmaCMUGebzThKTJzsD47jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
